name: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Fsutil Suspicious Invocation
notes:
This Building Block detects suspicious parameters of fsutil (deleting USN journal, configuring it with small size, etc).

Covered from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: JEcco, E.M. Anhaus, oscd.community
SIGMA Title: Fsutil Suspicious Invocation
SIGMA Description: Detects suspicious parameters of fsutil (deleting USN journal, configuring it with small size, etc).
  Might be used by ransomwares during the attack (seen by NotPetya and others).

Confidence: LOW

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
bb_references: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Fsutil Suspicious Invocation on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success
when the event matches Process Name (custom) is any of fsutil.exe
when the event matches LOWER("Command") LIKE '%deletejournal%' OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '%createjournal%' AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY BB:BehaviorDefinition: Fsutil Suspicious Invocation on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success
AND when the event matches Process Name (custom) is any of fsutil.exe
AND when the event matches LOWER("Command") LIKE '%deletejournal%' OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '%createjournal%' AQL filter query
